notes: All 9 responses are highly accurate and mutually consistent: every rep correctly extracted the title, dual axes (X 1958-2018, CO2 275-425 ppm, pH 8.03-8.33), three series with correct colors/stations, the atmospheric CO2 values (~315 to ~415 ppm), and the acidification narrative. No hallucinations in any response. The only recurring errors are a pCO2 2018 end value of ~400 ppm (GT ~380; only t0.4|rep1 and t0.7|rep0 got it closer at ~390) and an ocean pH start value of ~8.15 (GT ~8.12). Two reps (t0.4|rep2, t0.7|rep1) were the only ones to mention the inset map of Hawaii, which the others omitted without error.
